title: My Mom Left Me Homeless After I Paid For Her Cancer. So I Watched Her Lose The House.
description: I drained my $130,000 retirement to save my mom from stage-four cancer, but she secretly left the house to my sister and got me evicted. I found a hidden diary that proved my sister manipulated her, and the court made them sell everything. #FamilyBetrayal #JusticeServed #TrueStory
thumb_text: I SAVED MOM, SHE LEFT ME HOMELESS, SO I SUED.

thumb_lines.text: PAID FOR MOM'S CURE, THEN EVICTED
THE PROOF SHOWED MY SISTER LIED TO STEAL THE HOUSE
THE JUDGE FORCED THEM TO SELL THE HOUSE
